song.title: Your Love Never Fails
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C E
song.lyrics:
[v1] . Em C G 1) Nothing can separate . D Even if I ran away . Em C G D Your love never fails
.Em C G I know I still make mistakes . D But You have new mercies for me everyday . Em C G D Your love never fails [c] .C G D Chorus You stay the same through the ages . Am C Your love never changes . G D Am C There maybe pain in the night but joy comes in the morning
. G D And when the oceans rage . Am C I don't have to be afraid . G D Because I know that You love me . Am C G D Am Your love never fails .C Em D ---
[v2] . Em C G 2) The wind is strong and the water's deep . D But I'm not alone in these open seas . Em C G D Cause Your love never fails
.Em C G The chasm is far too wide . D I never thought I'd reach the other side . Em C G D But Your love never fails
[b] .C Em D Bridge You make all things work together for my good
[E] 1) Nothing can separate Even if I ran away Your love never fails I know I still make mistakes But You have new mercies for me everyday Your love never fails Chorus You stay the same through the ages Your love never changes There maybe pain in the night but joy comes in the morning And when the oceans rage I don't have to be afraid Because I know that You love me Your love never fails 2) The wind is strong and the water's deep But I'm not alone in these open seas Cause Your love never fails The chasm is far too wide I never thought I'd reach the other side But Your love never fails Bridge You make, all things, work together for my good.
